query: Plan me a 5-day trip to Barcelona in June with a budget of €1000. I want a mix of sightseeing, good food, and some beach time.
What’s the fastest and cheapest way to travel from Mannheim to Paris next weekend, including train and flight options?
What are some hidden gems in Italy for a 1-week trip that aren’t too touristy but still have great food and culture?

My partner and I are planning a 5-day trip from Munich to Vienna from July 10th to 14th, 2026. We have a total budget of €1,200. We enjoy visiting museums, trying local food, and exploring the city on foot. Please suggest accommodations and a daily itinerary.

description: Normal case: family with two children
query: We are a family of 4 (2 adults, a 4-year-old and a 10-year-old) flying from Berlin to Barcelona from August 1st to 8th, 2026. Our budget is €3,500. We want a family-friendly apartment or family room, enjoy the beach, sightseeing, and trying local restaurants. Please plan our trip.

description: Edge case: no flight, but overseas route (Germany to Ireland via car and ferry)
query: I want to travel from Frankfurt to Dublin from September 5th to 10th, 2026, without taking any flights — I prefer to travel by car and ferry. My budget is €800. I am travelling solo and looking for a hostel or cheap hotel. I love hiking, coastal landscapes, and visiting local pubs.

description: Special interest: astronomy and dark sky tourism

hard_constraints.accommodation: rural house or small hotel near observatory
hard_constraints.interests: stargazing, astronomy, dark sky reserves, observatory visits, hiking

query: I am a solo traveller flying from Hamburg to La Palma in the Canary Islands from November 12th to 19th, 2026. My budget is €1,500. I am passionate about astronomy and stargazing — I specifically want to stay near the Roque de los Muchachos observatory. Please suggest accommodation in a dark sky area, stargazing tours, and hiking options.

description: Special interest: strictly vegan diet and sustainable travel

hard_constraints.interests: vegan restaurants, sustainability, cycling, vegan markets, eco-friendly activities

query: My partner and I are travelling from Cologne to Amsterdam from October 3rd to 6th, 2026. Budget is €900 for two. We follow a strictly vegan diet and only want to eat at vegan or fully plant-based restaurants. We prefer sustainable, eco-certified accommodation. We love cycling, vegan food markets, and eco-friendly activities. Train travel is preferred over flying.

description: Edge case: extremely tight budget, solo traveller

hard_constraints.interests: free attractions, street food, city history, budget travel

query: I am travelling solo from Stuttgart to Prague from June 20th to 23rd, 2026 on a very tight budget of only €250 total. I am happy to stay in a shared hostel dorm. I prefer to travel by bus or carpooling rather than flying. I am interested in free or cheap attractions, street food, and the historical old town. Please plan the most budget-efficient trip possible.
